name: No Signal Escape Room
short_description: A small escape room with 5 original puzzles and a very special ending
detailed_description:
You are visiting your friend neverfragged98. Your friend is a Twitch streamer. He streams late into the night and you fall asleep. When you wake up, it is 3 a.m. and your friend is gone. The stream is still running and a user with the name streamofflinesoon86 has written: "I have informed the FBI that there is a dangerous assassin in your apartment. They will be here in 60 minutes and will open fire immediately."

Escape from this room as quickly as you can!

You can expect:

  • 5 original puzzles
  • Approx. 20 minutes of playing time
  • An escape room with lots of details in a low-poly look
  • A very special ending
  • Steam achievements!

Thank you!

By purchasing this game you also support GUM Games, a solo indie game developer from Northern Germany, which regularly publishes free trash games such as Colon Racer, the Anzeigenhauptmeister Simulator, My Chicken Nuggets burn!!! - The Game and many more!
